jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - 5paisa - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa:
5paisa is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
